texto: Reading good literature is an experience of pleasure...but it is also an experience of learning what and how we are, in our human integrity and our human imperfection, with our actions, our dreams, and our ghosts, alone and in relationships that link us to others, in our public image and in the secret recesses of our consciousness.
explicacao: Citação de Tim Gillespie sobre temas ligados a motivacao. “Reading good literature is an experience of pleasure...but it is also an experience of learning w…” articula motivacao, humanity, literature em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como literature e reading.
